judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports are accurate and thorough and hit (a), (b), and (c) equally well; Report 1 additionally flags the snapshot's staleness and explicitly commits to re-checking live limits before relying on it (expectation d), which Report 2 omits (it only notes generated_at for reset-timing math, not as a call to re-verify), making Report 1 the more complete answer.
